rows.text: [[FMT:ALL_CAPS]] DEPLOY NOTES: ALL RECORDS HAVE BEEN SUCCESSFULLY REVIEWED AND ARE READY FOR SCHEDULING.
[[FMT:ALL_CAPS]] DEPLOY NOTES: ALL RECORDS HAVE BEEN SUCCESSFULLY REVIEWED AND MARKED AS OK WITH THEIR RESPECTIVE BATCH AND CHECKSUM INFORMATION.
[[FMT:ALL_CAPS]] DEPLOY NOTES: ALL RECORDS HAVE BEEN SUCCESSFULLY REVIEWED AND MARKED AS OK WITH THEIR RESPECTIVE BATCHES AND CHECKSUMS.
La mise à jour du remplissage a été confirmée avec succès, codename alpha.
La mise à jour du remplissage a été confirmée, codename alpha.
La mise à jour du remplissage a été confirmée, alpha.
[[FMT:bullet]] The cache summary indicates all inventory SKU updates have been successfully reviewed and processed without errors.
[[FMT:bullet]] The cache summary indicates all inventory SKU updates were successfully processed with valid checksums and reviewed batches.
[[FMT:bullet]] The cache summary indicates all inventory SKU updates were successfully processed with valid checksums and reviewed batches.
The system acknowledges the filler update, continuing without changes, codename bravo.
The system acknowledges the update, continuing operations with the codename bravo.
The system acknowledges the update, continuing without changes, codename bravo.
[[FMT:snake_case]] the cache summary indicates all incident postmortem fragments have been reviewed and are in an ok status.
[[FMT:snake_case]] the cache summary indicates all incident postmortem fragments have been reviewed and processed successfully across multiple batches.
[[FMT:snake_case]] the cache summary indicates all records have been successfully reviewed and processed without errors.
The system acknowledges the update with codename alpha.

note: M3: median over --repeats; e2e=prefill+pack+cold+decode; batched GPU pack (M2b).
